creator: amdmi3@mail.ru
text:
Sturmbahnfahrer... for expert drivers only. If you want to master
it, try to have the laws of physics work with you, not against you.
Sturmbahnfahrer, the linux game, can be downloaded. Also, you can
download the MPEG movie which shows the frantic in-game action.

Enabling technologies behind Sturmbahnfahrer include the Open
Dynamics Engine and the portable game library known as PLIB.

Sturmbahnfahrer is a game by Bram Stolk.

WWW: http://www.sturmbahnfahrer.com/
